mod-divider-background-color.description:
Defined in `.spectrum-Divider--staticWhite`, `.spectrum-Divider--staticWhite.spectrum-Divider--sizeS`, `.spectrum-Divider--staticWhite.spectrum-Divider--sizeL`, `.spectrum-Divider--staticBlack`, `.spectrum-Divider--staticBlack.spectrum-Divider--sizeS`, `.spectrum-Divider--staticBlack.spectrum-Divider--sizeL`.
Used by `.spectrum-Divider`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-divider-background-color)`, if not set.

mod-divider-background-color-medium-stat.description:
Used by `--mod-divider-background-color`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-divider-background-color-static-white)`, if not set.

mod-divider-background-color-small-stati.description:
Used by `--mod-divider-background-color`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-divider-background-color-static-white)`, if not set.

mod-divider-background-color-large-stati.description:
Used by `--mod-divider-background-color`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-transparent-white-800)`, if not set.

mod-divider-background-color-medium-stat.description:
Used by `--mod-divider-background-color`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-divider-background-color-static-black)`, if not set.

mod-divider-background-color-small-stati.description:
Used by `--mod-divider-background-color`.

mod-divider-background-color-large-stati.description:
Used by `--mod-divider-background-color`.

mod-divider-thickness.description:
Used by `.spectrum-Divider`, `.spectrum-Divider--vertical`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-divider-thickness)`, if not set.

spectrum-divider-thickness.description:
Defined in `.spectrum-Divider`, `.spectrum-Divider--sizeS`, `.spectrum-Divider--sizeL`.
Used by `.spectrum-Divider`, `.spectrum-Divider--vertical`.
Defaults to `var(--spectrum-divider-thickness-large)`, if not set.

spectrum-divider-background-color.description:
Defined in `.spectrum-Divider--sizeL`, `.spectrum-Divider`.
Used by `.spectrum-Divider`.
Defaults to `var(--system-divider-background-color)`, if not set.

Used by `--mod-divider-background-color`.

Defined in `.spectrum-Divider`.

highcontrast-divider-background-color.description:

Used by `.spectrum-Divider`.
Defaults to `var(--mod-divider-background-color, var(--spectrum-divider-background-color))`, if not set.
